mapper.insert: insert into cert_issue_request ( cert_request_seq, cert_type_seq, users_id, request_reason ) values ( cert_request_seq.nextval, #{dto.cert_type_seq}, #{loginId}, #{dto.request_reason})
mapper.select:
select cir.cert_request_seq, cir.cert_type_seq, cir.users_id, cir.request_reason, cir.status, cir.requested_at, cir.handle_id, cir.approved_at, cir.rejected_at, cir.reject_reason, cir.canceled_at, cir.print_available_at, cir.print_expires_at, cir.applied_print_days, cir.applied_max_print, cir.printed_count, cir.created_at, cir.updated_at,
u.name, d.dept_name, r.rank_name, ct.cert_type_name,
hu.name as handler_name,
case when cir.status = 'APPROVED' then cir.approved_at when cir.status = 'REJECTED' then cir.rejected_at when cir.status = 'CANCELED' then cir.canceled_at else null end as processed_at
from cert_issue_request cir
inner join cert_type ct on cir.cert_type_seq = ct.cert_type_seq inner join users u on cir.users_id = u.id
left join departments d on u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq left join users hu on cir.handle_id = hu.id
order by case when cir.status = 'PENDING' then 1 else 2 end, cir.requested_at desc
